title: OIDC Relying Party Configuration
description: Configuration for an OpenID Connect Relying Party federation.

redirect_uri_prefix.description: The reverse proxy address to prepend to the redirect URI sent to the provider to communicate with this instance. An example is 'https://www.reverse.proxy.com/mga'. For the value 'https://www.reverse.proxy.com/mga', the kickoff uri would be 'https://www.reverse.proxy.com/mga/sps/oidc/rp/<FEDERATION_NAME>/kickoff/<PARTNER_NAME>' and the redirect uri 'https://www.reverse.proxy.com/mga/sps/oidc/rp/<FEDERATION_NAME>/redirect/<PARTNER_NAME>'

response_types.description: List of response types which determine the flow to be executed. Valid values to be included are 'code', 'token', 'id_token'. This selects the default flow to run when a metadata URL is specified in the partner configuration.
